title: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer

contact.address: 102 Bùi Văn Ba, District 7, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

summary: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience building and scaling financial systems, CMS platforms, and microservice-based applications. Strong expertise in Java (Spring Boot) and Node.js (NestJS) with hands-on experience across frontend frameworks including React, Next.js, and Vue.js. Proven track record in delivering production-ready systems, leading backend teams, and optimizing performance, reliability, and development workflows. Comfortable working in remote, cross-functional, and international teams, with a strong focus on clean architecture, scalability, and business impact. Currently exploring AI-driven systems, building chatbot solutions with Large Language Models (LLMs) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) to enhance product intelligence.
work_style: Comfortable with async communication and remote collaboration
Use AI tools like ChatGPT and Copilot for debugging, refactoring, and documentation
